title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - AU-6
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: AU-6 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control AU-6 in the Audit and Accountability family. The control title for AU-6 is Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: IA-1 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, IA-1, belongs to the Identification and Authentication family and is titled Identification and Authentication Policy and Procedures. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
